allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); e=d['expo']['extra']; print\('BACKEND_URL:', e.get\('BACKEND_URL','MISSING'\)\); print\('API_KEY:', 'SET' if e.get\('API_KEY'\) else 'MISSING'\); print\('EAS projectId:', e.get\('eas',{}\).get\('projectId','MISSING'\)\); print\('iOS bundleId:', d['expo']['ios'].get\('bundleIdentifier','MISSING'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('wwebjs version:', d.get\('version','?'\)\); deps=d.get\('dependencies',{}\); print\('puppeteer:', deps.get\('puppeteer', deps.get\('puppeteer-core','not found'\)\)\)")
Bash(cmd /c "taskkill /F /IM chrome.exe >nul 2>&1 & taskkill /F /IM chromium.exe >nul 2>&1 & echo Prosesler sonlandirildi")
